name: Baby Bunting Group Limited
analysis: BBN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 49% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.6750, stop A$1.4182, target A$2.3100 (2.47:1) — then trail it.
